description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in horizontally oriented, gray-toned wood or composite panels, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. Large windows of varying sizes are asymmetrically placed on the facade, providing ample natural light and visual interest. A prominent upper-level terrace is enclosed by a horizontal wooden railing, adding outdoor living space and architectural depth. The house sits on a paved base, suggesting an urban or suburban setting, and includes minimal decorative elements for a minimalist aesthetic. Subtle exterior lighting fixtures and a recessed entryway further enhance its modern character.
description: A modern, boxy house with gray wood paneling, large asymmetrical windows, and a flat roof, featuring an upper terrace with a wooden railing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered facade, multiple window sizes, and the upper terrace with a wooden railing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large ground-floor window, and the terrace above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, terrace, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the solid wall sections, terrace, and the clean, modern lines.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a large glass door, minimal steps, and no porch or decorative columns.
